response.overview: On a rural road, two brothers come across a briefcase filled with money and valuable contents. Seeing an opportunity, they take it without knowing who it belongs to.  Soon after, the true owners begin searching the entire town, determined to recover what was lost. Tension escalates when one of the brothers secretly sells part of what was inside, making the situation even more dangerous.  As threats close in and time runs out, the brothers must face the consequences of their decision in a deadly game where greed and survival collide.
response.title: Fuego Cruzado
